name: Chandigarh Wale
overview: Charan and Dimple move to Chandigarh to lead a better life, but they are unable to do so as they are constantly annoyed by the numerable unwanted guests who keep visiting them one after another.

trailers.title: Latest Punjabi Web-Series CHANDIGARH WALE ( Trailer ) | Chaupal Original | Rel. on 17th December
